# Feature: Qwen VoiceDesign generate provider

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-14 — issue #56 -->

**Issue:** #56  
**Epic:** `.qa/design/mve-voice-identity-pipeline.md` (§ API-Vertrag, Port 3767)  
**Feature slug:** `mve-qwen-voicedesign-generate`

## Intent

Lokaler Provider `qwen-voice-design` liefert echte Voice-Identity-Kandidaten via `VoiceCreationAdapter.generateCandidates` und `POST /voice-design/generate` — ohne UI- oder Casting-Migration in diesem Slice.

## Preconditions

- Desktop-App (Tauri) mit lokalem Runtime-Profil
- Python 3 verfügbar für Sidecar-Start (Stub-Modus ohne GPU: `QWEN_VOICEDESIGN_STUB=1`)
- Issue #55 merged (`VoiceCreationAdapter` + Registry)

## Happy Path

- [ ] `resolveVoiceCreationAdapter('qwen-voice-design')` liefert registrierten Adapter
- [ ] `generateCandidates` ruft `POST http://127.0.0.1:3767/voice-design/generate` mit Bearer-Token auf
- [ ] Response enthält `sessionId` und `candidates[]` mit `id`, `label`, `audioUrl`, `description`
- [ ] Default `candidateCount` = 3, max 4
- [ ] Python-Sidecar: `GET /health` → `{ ok, model, ready }`
- [ ] Stub-Modus (`QWEN_VOICEDESIGN_STUB=1`) erzeugt WAV ohne qwen-tts
- [ ] Tauri-Befehl `spawn_voice_design_sidecar` startet Sidecar auf Port 3767
- [ ] Unit-Tests mit HTTP-Mock für Adapter + API-Client grün

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Sidecar nicht erreichbar → klare deutsche Fehlermeldung
- [ ] Leere `description` → 400 Validierung (Client + Sidecar)
- [ ] `candidateCount` > 4 → 400 Validierung
- [ ] Teilweise fehlgeschlagene Kandidaten → `warnings` in Response wenn sinnvoll

## Regression

- [ ] Bestehende Voicebox-Casting-Flows unverändert (kein Casting-Migration in #56)
- [ ] Jobs-Sidecar (3765) weiter unabhängig von Voice-Design-Sidecar (3767)
- [ ] `registerDefaultVoiceEngineAdapters` unverändert funktionsfähig

## Assumptions

- `materialize` wird in Slice #57 implementiert — Adapter setzt `supportsMaterialize: false`
- CI testet nur TypeScript mit HTTP-Mocks; Python-Sidecar läuft nicht in Vitest

## Implementation Notes

- Python sidecar: `scripts/qwen-voicedesign-sidecar/server.py` (FastAPI, stub via `QWEN_VOICEDESIGN_STUB=1`)
- Tauri: `spawn_voice_design_sidecar`, `stop_voice_design_sidecar`, `voice_design_sidecar_health`
- TS: `qwen-voice-design-api.ts`, `qwen-voice-design.adapter.ts`, `voice-design-sidecar-lifecycle.ts`
- Registry: `registerDefaultVoiceCreationAdapters()` in `adapters/index.ts`
- Unit tests: API client, adapter, default registration (HTTP mocks)
- `materialize` deferred to #57 (`supportsMaterialize: false`)
